name: papiskill-monorepo
description: PapiSkill is a professional registry, editor, and CLI for portable agent SKILL.md packages.

scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm --workspace @papiskill/skill-core run build && npm --workspace papiskill run build && npm --workspace @papiskill/web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @papiskill/skill-core run typecheck && npm --workspace @papiskill/skill-core run build && npm --workspace papiskill run typecheck && npm --workspace @papiskill/web run typecheck
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build
